zh-CN.headlineFact: 世界杯巴西3:0海地，巴拉圭64秒进球淘汰土耳其
zh-CN.headlineView: 强队赢球还不够，真正的考题是淘汰赛前能不能把状态调顺
zh-CN.intro: 北京时间6月20日窗口，最重要一场是巴西3:0击败海地：库尼亚梅开二度，维尼修斯补时破门，巴西拿到关键三分，但进攻仍显慢热，拉菲尼亚伤退也留下隐患。其他赛场，巴拉圭凭加拉尔萨开场64秒进球1:0胜土耳其，把自己拉回出线竞争并送对手出局；摩洛哥1:0胜苏格兰，继续占据小组主动。世界杯第二轮开始后，比分之外更重要的是阵容健康、净胜球和临场效率。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 世界杯小组赛第二轮真正考验强队的不是名气，而是能否在身体和心理都紧起来时，把该拿的分稳稳拿到。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 巴西赢了，但踢得像还在热身；巴拉圭64秒进球，土耳其连咖啡都没凉就被推到悬崖边。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 巴西取胜但状态仍需校准，巴拉圭用最快进球改写小组形势，摩洛哥继续压住出线主动权。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 世界杯巴西3:0海地，巴拉圭64秒进球淘汰土耳其；强队赢球还不够，真正的考题是淘汰赛前能不能把状态调顺。

en-US.headlineFact: Brazil beat Haiti 3-0 as Paraguay knock out Türkiye with a 64-second goal
en-US.headlineView: winning is not enough; contenders must tune their form before the knockouts
en-US.intro: In the June 20 Beijing-time window, Brazil’s 3-0 win over Haiti was the main event: Matheus Cunha scored twice, Vinicius Jr added another before halftime, and Brazil took a needed three points while still looking short of fluency. Raphinha’s injury added a concern. Elsewhere, Paraguay beat Türkiye 1-0 through Matias Galarza’s 64-second goal, reviving their campaign and eliminating Türkiye, while Morocco edged Scotland 1-0. In matchday two, health, goal difference and efficiency are starting to matter as much as star names.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The second round of group games asks contenders a harder question: can they collect routine points when bodies and nerves tighten?
en-US.doudouQuote: Brazil won but still looked half in warm-up mode; Paraguay scored before Türkiye’s coffee cooled.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Brazil won without fully convincing, Paraguay changed Group D with the tournament’s fastest goal, and Morocco kept control.
en-US.headlineFull: Brazil beat Haiti 3-0 as Paraguay knock out Türkiye with a 64-second goal；winning is not enough; contenders must tune their form before the knockouts。

sources.title: Brazil 3-0 Haiti | Match report and highlights
Türkiye 0-1 Paraguay | Match report and highlights
Scotland 0-1 Morocco: World Cup 2026 - as it happened

zh-CN.headlineFact: AI公司CEO在G7被当成准国家行为体接待
zh-CN.headlineView: 模型越像基础设施，治理就越不能只靠公司自觉
zh-CN.intro: G7埃维昂峰会把OpenAI、Google DeepMind、Anthropic等AI公司负责人请到核心讨论桌，讨论模型控制、风险评估和全球安全。Altman强调AI未来不能只由实验室决定，Amodei呼吁民主国家协调，Hassabis则把当下形容为变革初期。AI企业从“技术供应商”变成“准基础设施权力”，这会让监管、外交和产业政策越来越难分开。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当AI公司开始像能源、金融和军工一样影响国家能力，公共规则就不能只是发布会后的补丁。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前老板去峰会是拉赞助，现在AI老板去峰会，像是被请去解释未来怎么别太吓人。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: G7把AI公司纳入核心治理讨论，显示模型能力已进入国家安全和制度设计层面。
zh-CN.headlineFull: AI公司CEO在G7被当成准国家行为体接待；模型越像基础设施，治理就越不能只靠公司自觉。

en-US.headlineFact: AI CEOs were treated like quasi-state actors at the G7
en-US.headlineView: as models become infrastructure, governance cannot rely on corporate restraint alone
en-US.intro: At the G7 summit in Evian, leaders from OpenAI, Google DeepMind and Anthropic joined high-level discussions on model control, risk assessment and global security. Sam Altman argued that AI’s future should not be decided only by labs; Dario Amodei called for coordination among democracies; Demis Hassabis framed the moment as the start of a deep transformation. AI companies are moving from vendors to infrastructure-level powers, blurring regulation, diplomacy and industrial strategy.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When AI companies start shaping national capacity like energy, finance and defense, public rules cannot remain an afterthought.
en-US.doudouQuote: Tech bosses used to attend summits to pitch. Now they attend to explain how the future will not run too hot.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The G7’s treatment of AI executives shows model power has entered national-security and institution-design territory.
en-US.headlineFull: AI CEOs were treated like quasi-state actors at the G7；as models become infrastructure, governance cannot rely on corporate restraint alone。

sources.title: New global order: AI CEOs as heads of nation-states
A viral doomsday scenario aims to shake Europe out of its AI complacency

zh-CN.headlineView: 资本市场喜欢增长，选民和政府更在意失控成本
zh-CN.intro: Anthropic在高估值和上市预期中遇到政治压力：美国两党都开始把前沿AI、网络安全、国家安全和数据中心用电放在同一张账单上讨论。市场看见的是模型能力和企业需求，地方社区看见的是电力、用水和就业替代，监管者看见的是责任归属。AI公司上市不再只是财务故事，而是一次公共信任考试。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: AI估值越高，社会对它的要求也越高；资本能买速度，买不到公共许可。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 招股书讲增长曲线，听证会问风险曲线，两个曲线最后都得画在同一张纸上。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: Anthropic上市预期暴露AI资本热与政治审查之间的张力。
zh-CN.headlineFull: Anthropic冲刺IPO却撞上AI政治逆风；资本市场喜欢增长，选民和政府更在意失控成本。

en-US.headlineFact: Anthropic’s IPO ambitions are running into AI politics
en-US.headlineView: markets like growth, but voters and governments price the cost of loss of control
en-US.intro: Anthropic’s expected path toward public markets is meeting political resistance as U.S. lawmakers connect frontier AI, cybersecurity, national security and data-center infrastructure in one debate. Investors see model capability and enterprise demand; local communities see power use, water needs and labor disruption; regulators see accountability gaps. An AI IPO is no longer only a financial story. It has become a public-trust test.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The higher AI valuations climb, the higher society’s demands become; capital can buy speed, not permission.
en-US.doudouQuote: The prospectus shows a growth curve; hearings ask for a risk curve. Both end up on the same page.
en-US.footerTakeaway: Anthropic’s IPO narrative captures the tension between AI capital enthusiasm and political scrutiny.
en-US.headlineFull: Anthropic’s IPO ambitions are running into AI politics；markets like growth, but voters and governments price the cost of loss of control。

sources.title: The Market’s AI Fanfare Is Running Into a Harsh Political Reality
OpenAI files for US IPO after Anthropic as AI giants head to public markets

zh-CN.headlineFact: 北约安卡拉峰会前，中东议题压过传统安全议程
zh-CN.headlineView: 联盟最难的不是写共同声明，而是管住成员各自的算盘
zh-CN.intro: 华盛顿研究所预告，6月22日安卡拉北约峰会将面对乌克兰、伊朗、土以紧张和中东危机交织的局面。土耳其既是北约成员，也是区域秩序里的关键中等强国；美国需要把它留在联盟轨道内，同时管理土耳其与以色列的摩擦。北约议程从欧洲防务扩展到中东秩序，说明联盟边界正在被现实推着外扩。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 大联盟真正的压力不在敌人有多强，而在成员利益不再天然排成一条线。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 北约开会像多人拼车：目的地写着安全，但每个人手机导航都不太一样。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 安卡拉峰会把土耳其、中东危机和北约内部协调推到同一张桌上。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 北约安卡拉峰会前，中东议题压过传统安全议程；联盟最难的不是写共同声明，而是管住成员各自的算盘。

en-US.headlineFact: Middle East tensions are crowding NATO’s Ankara agenda
en-US.headlineView: the alliance’s hard task is not drafting statements, but aligning member incentives
en-US.intro: Ahead of NATO’s June 22 summit in Ankara, analysts highlighted a crowded agenda: Ukraine, Iran, Turkish-Israeli friction and wider Middle East instability. Turkey is both a NATO ally and a consequential regional middle power; Washington needs to keep it anchored in the alliance while managing its rivalry with Israel. NATO’s agenda is stretching from European defense into Middle Eastern order because events are pushing the alliance’s perimeter outward.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The real pressure on a large alliance is not only the strength of its rivals, but the fact that members’ interests no longer line up automatically.
en-US.doudouQuote: A NATO summit is a carpool labeled security, with every passenger quietly following a different map.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The Ankara summit puts Turkey, Middle East instability and NATO coordination on the same table.
en-US.headlineFull: Middle East tensions are crowding NATO’s Ankara agenda；the alliance’s hard task is not drafting statements, but aligning member incentives。

sources.title: Middle East in Crisis, NATO in Disarray: The Stakes for the Ankara Summit
Turkey’s search for a Middle East order

zh-CN.headlineFact: 世界银行称2026年全球增速或放缓至2.5%
zh-CN.headlineView: 能源冲击提醒市场，通胀不是过去式，而是随时会返场的变量
zh-CN.intro: 世界银行最新全球经济展望预计，2026年全球增长放缓至2.5%，2027至2028年才可能随能源供应恢复和贸易改善而回升。报告同时警告，中东冲突已推高能源价格、重新点燃通胀压力，并可能让货币政策更紧。全球经济眼下不是没有增长，而是增长质量被地缘政治、油价和政策不确定性不断折价。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 经济预测最怕的不是数字低一点，而是每个假设背后都站着一个可能突然变脸的政治变量。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 市场刚把通胀送出门，油价在门口说：别急，我钥匙还在。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 世界银行把能源冲击和地缘风险列为2026年全球增长的主要下行压力。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 世界银行称2026年全球增速或放缓至2.5%；能源冲击提醒市场，通胀不是过去式，而是随时会返场的变量。

en-US.headlineFact: World Bank sees global growth slowing to 2.5% in 2026
en-US.headlineView: the energy shock reminds markets inflation is not gone, only waiting offstage
en-US.intro: The World Bank’s Global Economic Prospects projects global growth slowing to 2.5% in 2026 before firming in 2027-28 as energy supplies recover and trade improves. It also warns that Middle East conflict has triggered energy price increases, renewed inflation pressure and expectations of tighter monetary policy. The global economy is still growing, but the quality of that growth is being discounted by geopolitics, oil prices and policy uncertainty.
en-US.xiaziQuote: The problem with forecasts is not just a lower number; it is that every assumption now has a political variable standing behind it.
en-US.doudouQuote: Markets had just shown inflation the door. Oil prices are standing outside saying they still have a key.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The World Bank frames energy shocks and geopolitical risk as major downside pressures for 2026 growth.
en-US.headlineFull: World Bank sees global growth slowing to 2.5% in 2026；the energy shock reminds markets inflation is not gone, only waiting offstage。

zh-CN.headlineFact: NASA用公私合作推进火星科学任务
zh-CN.headlineView: 深空探索正在从国家工程变成国家与商业公司的联合项目
zh-CN.intro: NASA宣布新的公私合作模式推进火星科学：由NASA提供Aeolus大气科学仪器载荷，Relativity Space负责航天器、火箭和任务集成。这种安排显示，商业航天不再只负责发射服务，而开始进入任务设计和科学交付环节。火星探索的成本、节奏和风险分摊方式都在变化，科学任务也被迫学习创业公司的速度。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当商业公司从“运货”走向“共同做任务”，航天产业的边界就被重新画了一次。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 以前去火星像国家队远征，现在像国家队带着创业公司一起打客场。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: NASA把火星科学任务部分交给商业伙伴，显示深空探索组织方式正在改变。
zh-CN.headlineFull: NASA用公私合作推进火星科学任务；深空探索正在从国家工程变成国家与商业公司的联合项目。

en-US.headlineFact: NASA is using a public-private model for Mars science
en-US.headlineView: deep-space exploration is becoming a joint project between states and commercial firms
en-US.intro: NASA announced a new public-private partnership for Mars science: the agency will provide the Aeolus atmospheric-science payload, while Relativity Space supplies the spacecraft, launch vehicle and mission integration. Commercial space is moving beyond launch services into mission design and scientific delivery. That changes the cost, pace and risk-sharing model of Mars exploration, forcing science missions to absorb some startup speed.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When commercial firms move from delivery vendors to mission partners, the boundary of the space industry is redrawn.
en-US.doudouQuote: A Mars mission used to look like a national team expedition. Now the national team brings a startup to the away game.
en-US.footerTakeaway: NASA’s Mars partnership shows deep-space exploration is changing its operating model.
en-US.headlineFull: NASA is using a public-private model for Mars science；deep-space exploration is becoming a joint project between states and commercial firms。

sources.title: NASA Announces Public-Private Partnership to Advance Mars Science
What’s Happening in Space Policy June 14-20, 2026

zh-CN.headlineFact: 世界杯城市启用多层公共卫生监测
zh-CN.headlineView: 大型赛事拼的不只是安保和交通，还有看不见的流行病防线
zh-CN.intro: AP报道，北美世界杯期间，16个承办城市的公共卫生团队正用污水监测、医院数据和社交媒体线索追踪麻疹、诺如、甲肝、登革热等风险。PAHO此前已提醒美墨麻疹病例上升，CDC等机构又面临资源紧张。世界杯把球迷、航班、酒吧和城市交通连成一张高密度网络，公共卫生不再是后台工作，而是赛事体验的一部分。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 大型赛事的真正组织能力，常常体现在观众看不见、但一出事所有人都会感受到的系统里。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 球迷盯着积分榜，卫生部门盯着污水数据；都很紧张，只是一个喊进球，一个喊别扩散。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: 世界杯公共卫生监测凸显超大型活动的隐形治理压力。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 世界杯城市启用多层公共卫生监测；大型赛事拼的不只是安保和交通，还有看不见的流行病防线。

en-US.headlineFact: World Cup host cities are layering public-health surveillance
en-US.headlineView: mega-events test not just security and transport, but invisible disease defenses
en-US.intro: AP reported that public-health teams across the 16 North American World Cup host cities are monitoring measles, norovirus, hepatitis A, dengue and other risks through wastewater, hospital data and social-media signals. PAHO has warned of rising measles cases in the U.S. and Mexico, while agencies such as the CDC face stretched capacity. The World Cup links fans, flights, bars and transit into a dense network, making public health part of the event experience.
en-US.xiaziQuote: A mega-event’s real competence often lies in systems spectators never see until they fail.
en-US.doudouQuote: Fans watch the table; health teams watch wastewater. Both are tense, just about different kinds of spread.
en-US.footerTakeaway: World Cup disease surveillance shows the hidden governance burden behind mega-events.
en-US.headlineFull: World Cup host cities are layering public-health surveillance；mega-events test not just security and transport, but invisible disease defenses。

sources.title: Health sleuths are watching for disease threats during the World Cup

zh-CN.headlineFact: 联合国报告警告2030年前极可能再破高温纪录
zh-CN.headlineView: 气候风险已经从远方警报变成五年商业计划里的硬约束
zh-CN.intro: AP援引WMO和英国气象局报告称，2026至2030年期间至少有一年超过2024年最热纪录的概率达86%，五年均温超过1.5摄氏度阈值的概率约75%。报告还提示北极升温、亚马孙干旱火险和极端天气加剧。气候变化不再只是环保议题，它会进入保险、粮食、能源、电网和城市预算的每一张表。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 当“百年一遇”开始按五年规划出现，适应能力就成了国家和企业的基本功。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 天气预报以前告诉你带伞，现在像是在提醒董事会：预算别只按晴天写。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: WMO五年预测把破纪录高温和1.5摄氏度风险推到政策与商业决策眼前。
zh-CN.headlineFull: 联合国报告警告2030年前极可能再破高温纪录；气候风险已经从远方警报变成五年商业计划里的硬约束。

en-US.headlineFact: UN-backed forecast warns another heat record is likely before 2030
en-US.headlineView: climate risk has moved from distant warning to hard constraint in five-year plans
en-US.intro: AP, citing a WMO and UK Met Office report, said there is an 86% chance that at least one year from 2026 to 2030 will exceed 2024’s record heat, and about a 75% chance the five-year average will top 1.5C above pre-industrial levels. The report also points to Arctic warming, Amazon drought and fire risk, and intensifying extremes. Climate change is no longer only an environmental issue; it enters insurance, food, power grids, energy and city budgets.
en-US.xiaziQuote: When once-in-a-century risks start appearing inside five-year plans, adaptation becomes basic competence.
en-US.doudouQuote: Weather forecasts used to tell you to bring an umbrella. Now they remind boards not to budget only for sunny days.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The WMO forecast brings record heat and 1.5C risk directly into policy and business decisions.
en-US.headlineFull: UN-backed forecast warns another heat record is likely before 2030；climate risk has moved from distant warning to hard constraint in five-year plans。

sources.title: Think it’s hot now? The next five years will smash records, UN says

zh-CN.headlineFact: NASA尝试用商业航天器挽救下坠的Swift望远镜
zh-CN.headlineView: 修卫星比造卫星更难，也更像未来太空经济的必修课
zh-CN.intro: Space.com报道，服役20多年的Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory因太阳活动增强导致轨道下降，NASA与Katalyst Space Technologies合作，计划6月27日发射Link航天器，用机械臂和霍尔推进器对接这台没有推进能力的望远镜并抬升轨道。若成功，Swift可延寿至少五年，也会验证非合作目标在轨服务能力。未来太空经济的关键，不只是把东西送上去，还要能修、能拖、能延寿。
zh-CN.xiaziQuote: 太空资产越来越贵，真正成熟的产业不会只会发射，也要会维修和善后。
zh-CN.doudouQuote: 这事像给一台高速下坡的老相机做空中保养，技术员还不能让它摔了。
zh-CN.footerTakeaway: Swift救援任务可能成为商业在轨服务从概念走向常规能力的标志。
zh-CN.headlineFull: NASA尝试用商业航天器挽救下坠的Swift望远镜；修卫星比造卫星更难，也更像未来太空经济的必修课。

en-US.headlineFact: NASA will try to rescue the falling Swift space telescope with a commercial spacecraft
en-US.headlineView: servicing satellites is harder than building them, and central to the future space economy
en-US.intro: Space.com reported that the 20-year-old Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory is losing altitude because of stronger solar activity. NASA and Katalyst Space Technologies plan to launch the Link spacecraft on June 27, using robotic arms and Hall thrusters to dock with the propulsion-less telescope and raise its orbit. Success could extend Swift’s life by at least five years and prove non-cooperative on-orbit servicing. The next space economy is not only about launching assets, but repairing, moving and extending them.
en-US.xiaziQuote: As space assets become more valuable, a mature industry must know how to service and retire them, not just launch them.
en-US.doudouQuote: It is like servicing an old camera while it rolls downhill at orbital speed.
en-US.footerTakeaway: The Swift rescue could turn commercial on-orbit servicing from concept into routine capability.
en-US.headlineFull: NASA will try to rescue the falling Swift space telescope with a commercial spacecraft；servicing satellites is harder than building them, and central to the future space economy。

sources.title: NASA’s daring plan to save a space telescope falling out of space
